task_description: Replace the existing Task-Card linking architecture (cardTaskLinks mapping taskId to cardId) with a new Task-Pin Location system where tasks store canvas coordinates (x, y, canvasId) instead of card ID references. This improves long-term reliability by removing dependency on card existence.

verification.summary: Vite production build succeeds (365KB JS, 56KB CSS). All features implemented and review issues resolved. v2 review APPROVED with only low-severity edge cases remaining.
